purpose: Communicate to the user that content is being fetched or processed, and provide a visual placeholder that matches the expected layout to reduce perceived wait time.
whenToUse: Initial page or section load where content is fetched asynchronously.
Lazy-loaded list items while additional data pages are fetched.
Any async operation where the result will replace the placeholder in-place.
whenNotToUse: For actions that complete in under 300 ms — omit the skeleton to avoid flicker.
As an error state — use ErrorState if the fetch fails.
As an empty state — use EmptyState when the data loaded successfully but has no items.
Inside buttons or small interactive controls — use a spinner inside the control instead (see HumaxButton loading prop).

variants.name: skeleton
variants.description: Placeholder shapes that mimic the real content layout. Preferred for list items, cards, and profile headers. Animated with a shimmer effect (left-to-right gradient sweep).

variants.name: spinner
variants.description: Circular indeterminate progress indicator. Use when layout cannot be predicted (e.g., dialog loading, inline fetch result). Maps to Flutter CircularProgressIndicator.

variants.name: progressBar
variants.description: Linear indeterminate or determinate progress. Use for file uploads, multi-step processes where a percentage is known.

skeletonElements.name: SkeletonBox
skeletonElements.description: Rectangular placeholder. Use for image thumbnails, hero images, card backgrounds.

skeletonElements.name: SkeletonLine
skeletonElements.description: Single-line text placeholder. Width should reflect expected text length (e.g., 80% for body, 50% for label).
props: height (defaults to current body line height)

skeletonElements.name: SkeletonListItem
skeletonElements.description: Composite — SkeletonAvatar + 2 SkeletonLines. Mirrors a standard list tile.

skeletonElements.name: SkeletonCard
skeletonElements.description: Composite — SkeletonBox (image area) + 2–3 SkeletonLines. Mirrors a content card.

progressiveLoadingGuidance.above_the_fold: Render above-the-fold skeleton immediately. Load real content into the skeleton frames.
progressiveLoadingGuidance.list_pagination: Show SkeletonListItem for the next page while fetching. Replace when data arrives.
progressiveLoadingGuidance.minimum_display_time: 200 ms — avoid skeleton flash if data arrives very quickly. Use a minimum display timer.
progressiveLoadingGuidance.transition: Fade out skeleton and fade in content over 150 ms (HumaxDuration.fast) using AnimatedSwitcher.

accessibility.semanticLabel: Wrap skeleton container with Semantics(label: 'Loading…', liveRegion: true) so screen readers announce the loading state.
accessibility.removeWhenDone: When content loads, ensure the Semantics live region announces the new content naturally (no manual announcement needed if the widget tree replaces the skeleton).

flutterMappingNotes.shimmer: Use the `shimmer` pub.dev package or a custom ShaderMask animation. The gradient direction is left-to-right.
flutterMappingNotes.transition: AnimatedSwitcher(duration: HumaxDuration.fast, child: isLoading ? SkeletonWidget() : RealWidget())
